note: sentenceTokens is a genuine array from pipe(tokenArray, A.drop, A.take); the [0] read is followed by a P.isUndefined check, i.e. exactly the head-or-empty branch. Use A.head to return O.Option<Token> and replace the P.isUndefined guard with an O.match/O.isNone branch. A is already imported from @beep/utils in this file.

tokens is a genuine array from Chunk.toReadonlyArray(sentence.tokens); first is consumed via first?.start ?? 0. Use A.head(tokens) returning O.Option and resolve with O.getOrElse/O.match. A is already imported from @beep/utils in this file.

tokens is a genuine array from Chunk.toReadonlyArray(sentence.tokens); last is consumed via last?.end ?? 0. Use A.last(tokens) returning O.Option and resolve with O.getOrElse/O.match. A is already imported from @beep/utils in this file.
